steps.title: Name a fruit with vitamin C
steps.content: The goal is to provide an example of a fruit containing vitamin C. The sentence therefore needs to name a specific fruit and connect it to vitamin C.

steps.title: Reject broad vitamin facts
steps.content:
• Choice A: It mentions fruits generally but gives no specific fruit example.
  • Choice C: It explains why humans need food sources, not which fruit contains vitamin C.
  • Choice D: It compares humans and animals rather than naming a fruit.

steps.title: Use pineapple as the example
steps.content: The relevant sentence identifies vitamin C as ascorbic acid and names pineapple as a fruit that contains it. The answer is B.
